title: Better Discoveries
description: Version 1.20 | The Best Vanilla+ Modpack | Why settle for vanilla when you can settle for discovery?
body:
## FEATURES

🌎 Overhauled World Generation From The Ground Up

🔧 Quality of Life Additions such as Inventory Move

🏰 Tons of NEW Dungeons & Structures to explore

👀 Unique First Person Experience (Optional)

⚔️ New Custom Armors + Weapons

🌈 Shader Support + Optimization

🦌 Hundreds of New Creatures

👺 All New Bosses and Mobs 

💯 250+ Mods

## DESCRIPTION

**Better Discoveries** is dedicated to enhancing your vanilla experience in every possible way. At every turn, enhanced Villages, Dungeons, and Structures await, complemented by high FPS and stunning graphics!

The captivating landscape will occupy you for hours on end as you explore, build, and fight.
So, what are you waiting for? Download **Better Discoveries** NOW!

## REQUIREMENTS

This modpack is *very* graphically demanding, you should have at **least** a GTX 1660 GPU and 8GB of ram allocated to minecraft to run smoothly, 12GB+ preferred.
